Class GameLogic

java.lang.Object
Test.GameLogic
public class GameLogic extends Object
Handles the main game rules and turn flow for game. This class manages players, turn order, player actions, noble attraction, and the winning and final-round logic.

    Lets the current player buy a face-up development card from the market.

  • Field Details

    • TAKE_COLORS

      public static final String[] TAKE_COLORS

  • Constructor Details

    • GameLogic

      public GameLogic(List<String> playerNames, int winningCondition)
      Creates a new game with the given players and winning condition. If fewer than 2 players are provided, a computer player is added automatically.
      Parameters:
      playerNames - the names of the players in the game
      winningCondition - the number of points needed to trigger the final round

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentPlayer

      public Player getCurrentPlayer()
      Returns the player whose turn it currently is.
      Returns:
      the current player

    • getTurnNumber

      public int getTurnNumber()
      Returns the current turn number.
      Returns:
      the turn number

    • getPlayers

      public ArrayList<Player> getPlayers()
      Returns all players in the game.
      Returns:
      the list of players

    • getTokenBank

      public TokenBank getTokenBank()
      Returns the token bank used in this game.
      Returns:
      the token bank

    • getDevelopmentFaceUp

      public DevelopmentCardFaceUP getDevelopmentFaceUp()
      Returns the face-up development cards currently available.
      Returns:
      the face-up development cards

    • getNobleFaceUp

      public NobleFaceUP getNobleFaceUp()
      Returns the face-up nobles currently available.
      Returns:
      the face-up nobles

    • getPendingNobleChoices

      public ArrayList<Noble> getPendingNobleChoices()
      Returns the list of nobles the current player may choose from.
      Returns:
      the pending noble choices

    • isWaitingForNobleChoice

      public boolean isWaitingForNobleChoice()
      Returns whether the current player must choose a noble before ending their turn.
      Returns:
      true if a noble choice is pending, false otherwise

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Returns whether the game is over.
      Returns:
      true if the game has ended, false otherwise

    • isLastRoundTriggered

      public boolean isLastRoundTriggered()
      Returns whether the final round has been triggered.
      Returns:
      true if the final round has started, false otherwise

    • takeThreeTokens

      public MoveResult takeThreeTokens(String a, String b, String c)
      Lets the current player take three different non-gold tokens.
      Parameters:
      a - the first token color
      b - the second token color
      c - the third token color
      Returns:
      the result of the move

    • takeTwoTokens

      public MoveResult takeTwoTokens(String color)
      Lets the current player take two tokens of the same color. This is only allowed if the bank has at least 4 of that color.
      Parameters:
      color - the token color to take
      Returns:
      the result of the move

    • buyMarketCard

      public MoveResult buyMarketCard(int level, int index)
      Lets the current player buy a face-up development card from the market.
      Parameters:
      level - the card tier level
      index - the position of the card in that tier
      Returns:
      the result of the move

    • buyReservedCard

      public MoveResult buyReservedCard(int reserveIndex)
      Lets the current player buy one of their reserved cards.
      Parameters:
      reserveIndex - the index of the reserved card
      Returns:
      the result of the move

    • reserveTopDeckCard

      public MoveResult reserveTopDeckCard(int level)
      Lets the current player reserve the top card from a development deck.
      Parameters:
      level - the deck level to reserve from
      Returns:
      the result of the move

    • reserveFaceUpCard

      public MoveResult reserveFaceUpCard(int level, int index)
      Lets the current player reserve a face-up development card.
      Parameters:
      level - the card tier level
      index - the position of the card in that tier
      Returns:
      the result of the move

    • discardToken

      public MoveResult discardToken(String color)
      Discards one token of the given color from the current player back to the bank.
      Parameters:
      color - the token color to discard
      Returns:
      the result of the move

    • needsDiscard

      public boolean needsDiscard()
      Checks whether the current player has more than 10 tokens and must discard.
      Returns:
      true if the player must discard, false otherwise

    • endTurn

      public MoveResult endTurn()
      Ends the current player's turn if all end-of-turn conditions are satisfied. A player cannot end their turn while they still need to choose a noble or while they have more than 10 tokens.
      Returns:
      the result of ending the turn

    • determineWinners

      public List<Player> determineWinners()
      Determines the winner or winners of the game. The player with the most points wins. If players are tied on points, the one with fewer development cards wins. If still tied, all tied players are returned.
      Returns:
      the list of winners

    • chooseNoble

      public MoveResult chooseNoble(int index)
      Lets the current player choose one noble from the pending noble choices.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the noble to choose
      Returns:
      the result of the move

    • takeGold

      public MoveResult takeGold()
      Lets the current player take one gold token from the bank.
      Returns:
      the result of the move

    • debugGrantBonus

      public MoveResult debugGrantBonus(String color, int amount)
      Debug method that gives bonus points of a chosen color to the current player.
      Parameters:
      color - the bonus color to grant
      amount - the number of bonuses to grant
      Returns:
      the result of the debug action
